privileged_info_summary: The task 'import_surgical_guide_model@1' operates in the InVesalius 3 environment (invesalius3_env@0.1) with two data components: (1) CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case 0051, 108 DICOM slices, real data downloaded from InVesalius GitHub v3.0 release), and (2) a synthetically generated surgical guide STL model (4-facet triangular mesh created during task setup). The verification criteria expect at least 2 surfaces (bone and guide) in the final project file. The target color for the guide is red (RGB [1.0, 0.0, 0.0]), though the verifier applies asymmetric tolerance thresholds (R >0.8, G <0.4, B <0.4) rather than the claimed uniform ±0.2 tolerance. The project saves to /home/ga/Documents/guide_verification.inv3. Login uses user 'ga' with password 'password123'.
